headline: SDG&E Prepares for Summer Heat with Strong Grid and Customer Support Measures
summary: San Diego Gas & Electric (SDG&E) is entering summer 2026 with a stronger, more resilient grid supported by years of planning, targeted infrastructure investments and coordinated operations. With higher temperatures expected to drive increased energy demand, SDG&E is prepared to meet that demand while providing customers with tools and programs to help manage usage. This includes two rate adjustments that will lower electric rates and the California Climate Credit applied during peak summer month

headline: Is Sempra Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Though Sempra has lagged behind the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

raw.headline: Is Sempra Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?

headline: Thursday, Sempra Subsidiary, Sempra Infrastructure, Said ECA LNG Phase 1 Liquefaction Project In Ensenada, Mexico, Has Started Producing Liquefied Natural Gas As Part Of The Commissioning Process Toward Commercial Operations
summary: "This achievement reflects the dedication of the entire ECA LNG Phase 1 team and their unwavering commitment to the highest standards of successful project development," said Justin Bird, CEO of Sempra Infrastructure.
